title: Twemere Yesu Ko yaje mw isi

lines: Kutubwir' amahoro ye. Ni We nshuti nziza.—I Gologota,Yahaw' abazimiye.Mpora
nizera,—N'ubu nizeye Yuko Yesu yampfiriye; Ku Musaraba,—Yaranesheje;
Inzira yanjye—Ni Yesu wanjye;Anjyan' aho yangeneye. N' umugiraneza;—Nta
muntu n'umwe Yanga guh' agakiza Mpora nizera,—N'ubu nizeye Yuko Yesu
Mwami w'ubuntu,—Uhimbarizwe Kuk' uturarik' iteka. Tukwitabe twese,—
Twumv' ijwi ryaweRihamagara hose.Twizere twese,—Twe guhinyura Ko Yesu
